name: calendar-watch-renewer
description: Calendar_Watch_Renewer — scheduling sub-phase B Task B3. EventBridge-Scheduler-driven (every ~6h, B4) re-watch of Google Calendar push channels approaching expiry: queries the tenant-expiration-index GSI, registers a fresh events.watch channel (new UUID id + 256-bit token, SHA-256 hash to DDB per channel_token encryption Option 2), stops the old channel + deletes the old row, and on failure flips the row to unwatched_renewal_failed + emits the CalendarWatchRenewalFailed metric (B7). Per-tenant OAuth scope (G2), no channel-token store (G6), no OAuth process cache (G5).

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
